nasb.text: Give to him who asks of you, and do not turn away from him who wants to borrow from you.

esv.text: Give to the one who begs from you, and do not refuse the one who would borrow from you.

cnv.text: 有求你的，就給他；想借貸的，也不可拒絕。

ccb.text: 有求你的，就给他；有向你借的，不可拒绝他。

csbs.text: 有人求你，你要给他；有人要向你借什么，你不要拒绝。
